title: cassiope mertensiana subsp. californica
intro: Cassiope mertensiana subsp. californica is a subspecies of the Mountain Heather plant, native to the western coastal regions of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Cassiope mertensiana subsp. californica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
